advantages: Catches whole classes of bugs at compile time, before code runs.
Editor autocomplete and refactoring become reliable.
Types document data contracts (requests, messages, config).
Zero runtime cost — types are erased in the emitted JS.
disadvantages: Learning curve for generics and advanced types.
Types are erased, so runtime data (e.g. API JSON) still needs validation.
Overly complex types can hurt readability.
